name: Marie - Fap Night's At Frenni's
description:
You decide to go get a midshift snack at 1 in the morning at the nightclub. Unfortunately the vending machines are all broken (typical), so you resort to Marionettes little store.

Part 6 of 6 of the Fap Night's At Frennis bots. 6 bots, first bot-pack done. Let me know if y'all like having big packs of bots released at once.
creator: Jxmbxl
